subcodes.first_line: Verily, Generosity proclaimeth: "The Kingdom is God's, the Almighty, the All-Bountiful." Blessed is every generous soul that hath turned unto the ocean of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الکرم ینادی الملک لله العزیز الکریم طوبی لکل کریم اقبل الی بحر الکرم و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @generosity [kirama], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @living waters; water of life
